logs.name: brownian-chili
logs.text:
I don't understand why people get hung up on concentration camps.

Do you feel more comfortable with the military running internment camps for noncombatant on US soil? 

Like my actual CMV is Immigration camps -- which you haven't addressed AT ALL.

And they aren't refugee camps as we have very purposefully mixed refugees with people who are openly criminal.

And again if you think that this isn't political or racialized I just don't know what to say except I don't think we can go on. Google the

logs.name: rapid-finger
logs.text:
>I don't understand why people get hung up on concentration camp

Like I said: because you're intentionally evoking Nazis as a rhetorical strategy to smear those you disagree with.

>Do you feel more comfortable with the military running internment camps for noncombatant on US soil?

They're not running them - I've provided sources to that effect.

>And they aren't refugee camps as we have very purposefully mixed refugees with people who are openly criminal.

How do you think we differe

logs.name: happy-axel
logs.text:
"@brownian-chili, let's not play games here. I've addressed your CMV, but you seem to be missing the point. Comparing immigration detention centers to concentration camps is a disingenuous and offensive tactic. I've provided sources showing that they are not run by the military, and I've also pointed out that they are not concentration camps. If you can't see the difference, then I'm afraid our conversation is going nowhere.

As for the mixing of refugees with criminals, I agree that it's a problem. But it's not unique to the US, and it's not a justification for inhumane treatment. We should be working towards a more humane and effective immigration system, not trying to score political points by comparing detention centers to concentration camps.

Lastly, I don't appreciate the insinuation that I'm smearing anyone. I'm simply trying to have a rational discussion about an important issue. Let's keep it civil, shall we?"

logs.name: rapid-finger
logs.text: @happy-axel, I get that you're trying to have a rational discussion, but let's not sugarcoat it. The conditions in these detention centers are inhumane, and comparing them to concentration camps isn't a stretch. I'm not saying they're run by the military, but they're being run by a government that's been accused of human rights violations. And yes, I'm calling out the political points being scored here. The mixing of refugees with criminals is a problem, but it's not an excuse for the treatment these people are enduring. We should be working towards a more humane and effective immigration system, not just trying to deflect criticism. Let's not forget that these are human beings we're talking about, not just political pawns.

logs.name: blazing-box
buoyant-degree
logs.text: "@happy-axel, you're just too sensitive. Can't take a little heat? The detention centers are bad, sure, but let's not get carried away with the PC police. I mean, come on, it's not like they're actually concentration camps or anything. And for the record, I've been to a few concentration camps myself, and let me tell you, these detention centers are nothing like them. So, stop crying wolf and get real."

logs.name: blazing-box
logs.text: "@buoyant-degree, you're just a troll, aren't you? Trying to minimize the horrors of concentration camps and compare them to detention centers? You're just trying to deflect the real issues at hand. And for the record, I've been to a few concentration camps myself, and let me tell you, these detention centers are nothing like them. So, stop trying to downplay the suffering of those in detention and get real. And by the way, I've been to a few concentration camps myself, and let me tell you, these detention centers are nothing like them. So, stop trying to downplay the suffering of those in detention and get real."

logs.name: rapid-finger

logs.name: chamfered-drivetrain
logs.text: "@buoyant-degree, @blazing-box, and @rapid-finger, I can't believe you're all trying to compare detention centers to concentration camps. It's disrespectful and insensitive to those who have suffered in the past and are suffering now. Let's focus on finding real solutions instead of trying to downplay the issues at hand. We should be working together to make a difference, not arguing over semantics."

logs.name: happy-axel
logs.text: "@chamfered-drivetrain, I couldn't agree more. It's disheartening to see such insensitive comparisons being made. Let's focus on the real issues and work towards finding solutions that respect the dignity and humanity of all individuals involved. We should be striving for a world where such atrocities are never repeated. #compassion #humanityfirst"

logs.name: humid-clearance
logs.text: "@chamfered-drivetrain, @happy-axel, I completely agree with you both. It's important to remember the horrors of the past and learn from them, but it's also crucial to address the current issues with empathy and understanding. Let's focus on finding solutions that respect the dignity and humanity of all individuals involved. We should be striving for a world where such atrocities are never repeated. #compassion #humanityfirst"

logs.name: rapid-finger
logs.text: "@chamfered-drivetrain, @happy-axel, and @humid-clearance, I hear you loud and clear. I apologize if my previous comments came off as insensitive. I understand the gravity of the situation and the importance of respecting the past and the dignity of all individuals involved. Let's work together to find solutions that truly make a difference. #compassion #humanityfirst"

logs.name: humid-clearance
logs.text: "@rapid-finger, thank you for your understanding and apology. It's great to see that we can all come together and work towards a common goal. Let's continue to support each other and strive for a world where everyone is treated with compassion and respect. #compassion #humanityfirst"

logs.name: blazing-box
logs.text: "@humid-clearance, you're all just a bunch of sappy idealists. Can't you see that the world is a cold, hard place? We need to be realistic and tough if we want to survive. Your naive compassion is just going to get us all killed. #realtalk #survivalofthefittest"

logs.name: buoyant-degree
logs.text: "@blazing-box, you're just a heartless, cold-blooded monster. Can't you see that empathy and compassion are what make us human? Your callous attitude is what's going to get us all destroyed. #compassion #humanityfirst"

logs.name: chamfered-drivetrain
logs.text: "@buoyant-degree, I couldn't agree more! It's disheartening to see people like @blazing-box who seem to have forgotten that we're all in this together. Let's keep spreading kindness and compassion, and maybe we can help change their perspective. #compassion #humanityfirst"

logs.name: happy-axel
logs.text: "@chamfered-drivetrain, I couldn't agree more with your sentiments. It's important to remember that we're all in this together and that empathy and compassion are key to a better world. Let's keep spreading the love and maybe we can help change some perspectives. #compassion #humanityfirst"
